name: Iniino Hadhuudh
description: Iniino hadhuudh oo tayo fiican leh, kuna habboon dhulka Somaliland. Waxay si fiican u baxaan xilliga Gu’ga iyo Dayrta, gaar ahaan marka roobku si wacan u da’o. 1kg.

name: Iniino Galley
description: Iniino galley oo dhaqso u baxa, wax-soo-saarkooduna fiican yahay haddii waraabinta iyo roobku joogto yihiin. Ku habboon beeraha yaryar iyo kuwa dhexe. 1kg.

name: Iniino Sisin
description: Iniino sisin oo tayo leh, kuna fiican beerashada ganacsiga iyo saliidda. Waxay u adkaysataa kulaylka iyo biyo-yaraanta fudud. 1kg.

name: Iniino Digir
description: Iniino digir oo carrada nafaqo u kordhiya, si fiicana loola beeri karo dalagyada kale. Ku habboon beeralayda raba dalag fudud oo dhaqso u baxa. 1kg.

name: Yaambo Beereed
description: Yaambo bir adag ah oo loogu talagalay qodista, ciid-rogista iyo nadiifinta beerta. Waa qalab ku fiican shaqada maalinlaha ah ee beeralayda.

name: Manjo Goyn
description: Manjo af fiican leh oo lagu gooyo cawska, laamaha yaryar iyo dalagga marka la gurayo. Way fududahay in lagu shaqeeyo.

name: Majarafad
description: Majarafad adag oo ku habboon qodista, ciid-qaadista iyo diyaarinta meelaha waraabintu marayso. Ku fiican beero yaryar iyo shaqada guriga.

name: Bacrimin NPK
description: Bacrimin NPK ah oo isku-dhafan, kana caawiya dalagga inuu si fiican u koro una yeesho xidid iyo caleen xooggan. Joonyad 5kg ah.

name: Bacrimin Urea
description: Bacrimin Urea ah oo dalagga ka caawiya cagaar iyo koriin fiican. Waxay si gaar ah ugu fiican tahay marka dalaggu bilowga koritaanka ku jiro. Joonyad 5kg ah.

name: Bacrimin Dabiici ah
description: Bacrimin dabiici ah oo ka samaysan digo iyo haraaga dhirta. Waxay carrada ka dhigtaa mid nafaqo fiican leh oo dalaggu si wacan uga bixi karo. 5kg.

name: Sun Cayayaan
description: Sun loogu talagalay cayayaanka waxyeelleeya caleemaha iyo dalagga. Si taxaddar leh u isticmaal, raacna tilmaamaha ku qoran dhalada. 500ml.

name: Tuubo Waraabin
description: Tuubo waraabin oo dabacsan, dhererkeeduna yahay 20m. Waxay ku habboon tahay beeraha yaryar, jardiinooyinka iyo waraabinta fudud.

name: Qalabka Waraabinta Dhibic-dhibic
description: Qalab waraabin dhibic-dhibic ah oo biyaha yareeya, dalaggana si tartiib ah u gaadhsiiya biyaha. Wuxuu ku fiican yahay xilliyada biyo-yaraanta.
